text:
I now have the average of 418.36. Next, I need to count how many numbers in the list [79, 71, 45, 45, 56, 79] are below this average using the count_below_threshold tool.
<tool_call_answer>[{"name": "count_below_threshold", "arguments": {"values": [79, 71, 45, 45, 56, 79], "threshold": "$var2.output_0$"}, "label": "$var3"}]</tool_call_answer>
